─────────────
OBJECTIVE
─────────────
Backend Developer with a strong foundations in computer science and practical experience in building
applications using ASP.NET Core, Entity Framework, and SQL Server. Skilled in designing scalable APIs,
integrating databases, and delivering efficient backend solutions. Passionate about backend architecture,
performance optimization, and contributing to impactful software projects.

EJADA Egypt – Backend (Offshore Support & Demand Center) Intern
Ejada, Almazah, Cairo | Aug 2025 – Sep 2025
 Developed and maintained backend services and web applications using Java, Spring Boot, Spring Security, and
RESTful APIs, ensuring secure and scalable system design.
 Leveraged JPA, Hibernate, and Microservices architecture to build scalable, high-performance backend modules
with efficient data handling and persistence.
Information Technology Institute (ITI) – Web Development using ASP.NET Core MVC Intern
Online | Sep 2025 – Oct 2025
 Completed a practical internship focused on ASP.NET Core MVC Web Development using C#, Entity Framework
Core, and SQL Server.
 Gained hands-on experience in building dynamic, data-driven web applications by applying concepts of MVC
architecture, dependency injection, database design, and authentication & authorization.
 Applied SOLID principles, clean code practices, and layered architecture to ensure scalability, maintainability,
and high-quality software design.

──────────────────────
TRAINING & COURSES
──────────────────────
Ain Shams University
Android Development Intern (Summer Training) | Aug 2025 – Sep 2025
Built a mobile application using Java and Android SDK as part of the training program.
Web Development Intern (Summer Training) | Aug 2024 – Sep 2024
Developed a web project using HTML, CSS, and JavaScript as part of the training program.

────────────
PROJECTS
────────────
Map Routing Project (C#): Applied graph algorithms (shortest path) with a focus on time complexity
optimization for efficient route calculation.
Pac-Man Game (C++): Built using Graph and SFML, applying data structures and BFS algorithm, with
basic AI techniques for enemy behavior.
Operating System (C): Designed and developed operating system modules covering memory
management, process scheduling, and concurrency control with locks.
Library Management System (Java): Developed using Object-Oriented Programming (OOP) principles to
manage books, users, and transactions.
Flight Reservation DBMS Project (SQL): Developed a relational database system to handle flight
bookings, passenger information, and scheduling.
Gym Website (HTML , CSS , JS): Developed a responsive website showcasing gym services and
membership features.
Sentiment Analysis Classification (Python): Implemented using Natural Language Processing (NLP)
techniques to classify text based on sentiment.
Connect-4 Game (C++): Implemented game logic, win detection algorithms, and integrated audio
effects for an enhanced gameplay experience.
Video Game Sales Prediction (Python): Applied Machine Learning algorithms to analyze datasets and
predict video game sales based on features such as genre, platform, and region.
Tiny Compiler (C#): Developed a compiler for the Tiny language in C#, including lexical analysis, parsing,
and code generation.
E-Commerce Website (Java, Spring Boot, Microservices): Developed the backend of an e-commerce
platform, implementing REST APIs, product and order management, and a scalable microservices
architecture.
University Management System (ASP.NET Core MVC): Enabled the management of students,
instructors, and courses with defined roles and access levels for each user type. Implemented key
features such as user registration and login, CRUD operations, role-based access control, and data
management using Entity Framework Core.

──────────
SKILLS
──────────
Programming & Frameworks: C++, C#, Java, ASP.NET Core, Entity Framework, Spring Boot, Microservices,
Python
Web Technologies: HTML, CSS, JavaScript, SQL
Core Concepts: REST APIs, OOP, Data Structures, Algorithms, Problem Solving
Soft Skills: Teamwork, Leadership, Time Management, Networking Fundamentals

─────────────
LANGUAGES
─────────────
Arabic (Native)
English (Very good)

Abdelrahman Amro Zakzouk

01013693331 | Abdulrahman.zakzouk@yahoo.com | linkedin.com/in/abdelrahman-zakzouk-863a44253 | github.com/abdelrahman1903

─────────────
EDUCATION
─────────────
German University in Cairo | Cairo, Egypt
Bachelor of Computer science and Engineering | Oct. 2021 – July 2026
• Bachelor Thesis (A+): AI-powered multimodal assistant for cultural interpretation and tourism.
• Publication (AC 2025): Smart Tourism Meets AI: A Multimodal Assistant for Exploratory Cultural Engagement. Peer-reviewed
short paper accepted at the International Conference on Applied Computing, based on my A+ bachelor thesis.

────────────
PROJECTS
────────────
Fantasy Premier League Graph-RAG Assistant | Python, Neo4j, LangChain, LLMs 3 December 2025 – 15 December 2025
• Built a Graph-RAG FPL assistant combining Neo4j knowledge graphs with LLMs for grounded player insights.
• Implemented deterministic intent routing to select Cypher queries, RAG-based embedding retrieval, or clarification.
• Designed reusable Cypher templates for player stats, fixtures, and season-level analysis.
• Integrated RAG embedding pipelines for player similarity and recommendation using numerical and text-based features.
• Evaluated multiple LLMs (Gemini, LLaMA, DeepSeek, Mistral) across accuracy, latency, and response quality.
ZakAI: Personal AI Assistant | Python, Node.js, FastAPI, langchain, Flutter, Next.js | July 2025 – October 2025
• Built a production-style multimodal AI assistant with Python and Node.js backends and Flutter/Next.js frontends.
• Implemented LLM tool-calling, structured outputs (Pydantic), dynamic routing, and robust logging for observability and debugging.
• Integrated STT (Whisper), TTS (ElevenLabs), vision (Qwen3-VL-2B), and image generation (Stable Diffusion).
• Designed multi-user architecture with JWT authentication, isolated sessions, and persistent chat history.
• Connected external tools (Gmail OAuth2, Weather APIs) through function calling and agent-style orchestration.
AI Tourist Assistant for Cultural Interpretation — Thesis Project (Awarded an A+ Grade) March 2025 – June 2025
Python, React, FastAPI, Google Gemini Flash 2.5
• Designed an AI-powered cultural assistant using RAG, tool calling, and structured LLM outputs.
• Built a router-based backend supporting Cultural Q&A, Retrieval-Augmented Generation, and Tool Execution.
• Implemented document ingestion and semantic search using Docling, LanceDB, and Nomic embeddings.
• Added geographic reasoning for nearby place recommendations and contextual responses.
• Integrated Whisper STT for real-time voice interaction.
CariGo: Trip Planner Website | React, Node.js, MongoDB, Express.js, Postman | October 2024 – December 2024

• Developed a MERN stack trip planner platform with JWT authentication for secure access.
• Built REST APIs for itineraries, bookings, and user preferences with Node.js and Express.js.
• Implemented payments system with Stripe integration, including refunds and points redemption.
• Integrated a currency conversion API to display trip prices in users’ preferred currency.
• Automated booking updates and offers via email notifications using Nodemailer.
Database Engine | Java, Serialization, B+ Trees | March 2024 – May 2024

• Implemented table storage using serialized files with B+ tree indices for fast retrieval.
• Developed CRUD operations, schema management, and a custom query function replicating SQL SELECT for data retrieval.
• Optimized memory with on-demand page loading for efficient disk usage.
Database System for Advising Students | SQL, ASP.NET, | September 2023 – January 2024

• Designed a relational database schema for an academic advising system.
• Implemented stored procedures, views, and triggers for business logic and consistency.
• Built an ASP.NET app supporting course scheduling, graduation planning, and payments.

──────────────────────────────
EXTRACURRICULAR ACTIVITIES
